operatorReportedClearances.note: Operator reported audit and legal requirements cleared.

beforeTouchingProduction: Confirm full launch is not approved.
Confirm treasury funding is not approved.
Confirm Safe payload is not generated.
Confirm mainnet execution queue is disabled.
beforePublicStatusChange: Confirm public language does not imply capability approval.
Confirm updated page and API route are reachable.
Commit and publish updated public artifacts.
beforeFutureCapabilityApproval: Open a separate action-specific approval path.
Confirm monitor passing and no active incidents.
Confirm Safe review if on-chain action is involved.
Do not reuse restricted-mode approval as activation approval.

hardRule: This operator checklist documents restricted-mode operating controls only. It does not approve launch, funding, public sale, staking, rewards, buybacks, execution, automation, autonomous execution, Safe payload generation, or Safe transaction execution.
